inputs.text: main thoda bahut bukhar mehsoos kar raha hoon, sar dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fevers

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: headache can be a symptom of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: early stages of typhoid can present with non-specific symptoms like fever and headache

inputs.text: bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai, kabz bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: abdominal pain and constipation are common in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: fever can persist in viral fevers, but abdominal pain is less common

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: step-wise fever and abdominal pain can be seen in typhoid, but other symptoms are not yet present

inputs.text: tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho raha hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: cardinal signs like step-wise fever, abdominal pain, and diarrhea after constipation are characteristic of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: diarrhea can occur in gastroenteritis, but the pattern of symptoms is not typical

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: malaria can cause fever and weakness, but the other symptoms do not fit

inputs.text: bahut thakawat mehsoos ho rahi hai, bukhar abhi bhi hai, pet dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: prolonged fever, abdominal pain, and signs of intestinal perforation like bruising are characteristic of complicated typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of response to treatment and presence of typhoid-specific symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of classic symptoms like chills and rigors
